title: Cosmos Flow Field — noise-driven flowing streams
title_vi: Cosmos Flow Field — dòng chảy theo trường nhiễu
summary: Particles trace a value-noise flow field into long curving streamlines; glowing dashes flow along each path in the Cosmos accents, creating a silky generative current. Pure Canvas 2D, zero deps, runs offline; deterministic and seamless.
usage_notes: RUN: double-click index.html. Streamlines are precomputed once by integrating a value-noise angle field (ang = noise(x,y)*2.2τ) from seeded start points. Each frame a short bright dash flows along its path at head=((u+phase) mod 1)*len (mod-1 → seamless), fading at the ends with a sine envelope; additive blending glows. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 + window.__seek(t). TUNE: line count, fs (field scale), step, dash length.
summary_vi: Hạt men theo trường value-noise thành các dòng cong dài; vệt sáng chạy dọc mỗi đường tông Cosmos, tạo dòng chảy generative mượt. Thuần Canvas 2D, không lib, chạy offline; deterministic & loop liền.
notes: Batch factory #6. Streamline tính sẵn từ field noise; dash chạy head=((u+phase)mod1)*len → loop; envelope sin + additive. A/B-tier.
